changes: Guardian: Recast time has been increased from 24 to 30 seconds.
Holy Sheltron: Increase to damage dealt from Sword Oath has been increased from 10% to 15%.
Holy Sheltron: Reduction to damage taken from Shield Oath has been reduced from 20% to 15%.
Wind's Reply: Duration of increased movement speed effect has been increased from 3 to 4 seconds.
Wind's Reply: Potency of additional damage dealt by Pressure Point has been increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
Earth's Reply: Potency has been increased from 2,000 plus 25% of compiled damage to 3,000 plus 25% of compiled damage.
Earth's Reply: Cure potency has been increased from 4,000 plus 50% of compiled damage to 6,000 plus 50% of compiled damage.
High Jump: Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Starcross: Potency has been increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Hissatsu: Chiten: Potency of counter attacks has been reduced from 6,000 to 4,000.
Hissatsu: Soten: Potency has been reduced from 4,000 to 3,000.
Zanshin: Potency has been reduced from 6,000 to 5,000.
Rattling Coil: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 45 seconds.
Rattling Coil: Recast time reduction upon earning a kill or an assist has been increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Uncoiled Twinfang: Recast time has been reduced from 1 to 0.7 seconds.
Uncoiled Twinblood: Recast time has been reduced from 1 to 0.7 seconds.
World-swallower: Increase to damage dealt from Noxious Gnash effect has been increased from 20% to 25%.
Repelling Shot: Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 4,500.
Pitch Perfect: Potency for the first enemy has been increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Pitch Perfect: Potency for enemies after the first has been increased from 4,000 to 4,500.
Drill: Potency has been increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Paradox: Potency has been increased from 6,000 to 9,000.
Xenoglossy: The additional effect "Absorbs 50% of damage dealt as HP" has been added.
Radiant Aegis: Reduction to damage taken has been increased from 20% to 25%.
Tempera Coat: Recast time has been reduced from 24 to 20 seconds.
Tempera Coat: Reduction to recast time when barrier is completely absorbed has been reduced from 8 seconds to 5 seconds.
Tempera Grassa: Reduction to recast time when barrier is completely absorbed has been reduced from 8 seconds to 5 seconds.
Star Prism: Effect duration has been increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Biolysis: Damage over time potency has been increased from 2,000 to 3,000.
Biolysis: Potency increase when under the effect of Recitation has been reduced from doubled to 50%.
Chain Stratagem: Effect duration has been increased from 6 to 10 seconds.
Seraphic Halo: Potency has been increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Aspected Benefic: Healing over time potency of Diurnal Benefic has been reduced from 4,000 to 3,000.
Gravity II: Potency has been reduced from 8,000 to 7,500.
Gravity II: Heavy effect duration has been increased from 2 to 3 seconds.
Gravity II: Additional effect now only applies to first target.
Gravity II (When executed after Double Cast): Potency has been reduced from 8,000 to 7,500.
Gravity II (When executed after Double Cast): Additional effect has been changed from Heavy to Bind.
Gravity II (When executed after Double Cast): Additional effect now only applies to first target.
Minor Arcana: Effect duration has been reduced from 20 to 10 seconds.
Epicycle: Barrier effect duration has been reduced from 10 to 5 seconds.
Pneuma: Barrier strength has been increased from a heal potency of 3,000 to 4,000.
Pneuma: Cure potency of the healing effect applied when Haimatinon expires has been increased from 3,000 per remaining stack of Haimatinon to 4,000 per remaining stack of Haimatinon.
Eukrasia: Recast time has been reduced from 16 to 12 seconds.
Psyche: Potency has been increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Toxikon II: Potency for enemies after the first has been increased from 2,000 to 4,000.

new_content.name: Cloud of Darkness (Chaotic)
new_content.description: A new alliance raid designed for 24 players. It requires item level 710 or above and features a 90-minute time limit.

new_content.name: Appreciated Value
new_content.description: New class quest for Disciple of the Hand or Land level 100.

new_content.name: The Case of the Displaced Inspector
new_content.description: New side story quest for Inconceivably Further Hildibrand Adventures (level 100).

new_content.name: Laying New Tracks
new_content.description: New custom delivery quest for Disciple of the Hand or Land level 90.

new_content.name: Custom Deliveries: Nitowikwe
new_content.description: A system allowing players to complete deliveries to earn gil, experience points, and scrips, with the ability to unlock glamours for the NPC.

new_content.name: Raid Finder
new_content.description: System used to register and challenge Cloud of Darkness (Chaotic).

new_content.name: Stone, Sky, Sea
new_content.description: Updated to include Cloud of Darkness (Chaotic) in the list of challenges.

housing.name: Ihuykatumu Flower Plot
housing.description: You don't know the name of these grotto flowers, but looking at them makes you feel a bit drowsie.

housing.name: Zormor Stone Lantern
housing.description: Since olden times, this lantern has illuminated the rocky mountain path at the Summit of Zor─but no more.

housing.name: Electrope Turret
housing.description: As formidable as it looks, it's merely a lawn decoration─but your neighbors don't need to know that.

housing.name: Lesser Pillar of Tural
housing.description: Recovered from Xak Turali ruins, this statue depicts an urn containing a serpentine entity of diminutive size.

housing.name: Origenics Chair
housing.description: This office chair was designed to facilitate hours of soul-sucking work.

housing.name: Origenics Monitor Desk
housing.description: A spacious work desk taken from a storage room in the soul processing division. Additional monitors not included.

housing.name: Skydeep Lamp
housing.description: Recovered from the Skydeep Cenote's innermost chamber, this lamp gives any room an ethereal purple tinge.

housing.name: Wachumeqimeqi Balloon
housing.description: Add intrigue to your abode with a little piece of the Wachumeqimeqi Appreciation Sale.

housing.name: Paladin Display Crystal
housing.description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the paladin.

housing.name: Warrior Display Crystal
housing.description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the warrior.

housing.name: Monk Display Crystal
housing.description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the monk.

housing.name: Ninja Display Crystal
housing.description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the ninja.

housing.name: Bard Display Crystal
housing.description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the bard.

housing.name: Black Mage Display Crystal
housing.description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the black mage.

housing.name: Summoner Display Crystal
housing.description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the summoner.

housing.name: White Mage Display Crystal
housing.description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the white mage.

housing.name: Scholar Display Crystal
housing.description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the scholar.

housing.name: Strayborough Wall Lamp
housing.description: The eerie glow of this three-light fixture brings to mind a haunted mansion.

housing.name: Traumerei Floor Stencil
housing.description: This whimsical floor stencil depicts a decidedly cuter interpretation of the Lord of Nightmares.

glamour.name: Dawnblazer Attire Coffer
glamour.description: A banded chest containing a complete set of Dawnblazer attire.

glamour.name: Clouddark Head Gear Coffer (IL 730)
glamour.description: A tenebrous chest containing a piece of clouddark attire.

glamour.name: Clouddark Chest Gear Coffer (IL 730)
glamour.description: A tenebrous chest containing a piece of clouddark attire.

glamour.name: Shroud of Darkness
glamour.description: Envelop yourself in this sliver of the Cloud of Darkness's raiment, and know the feeling of being the dread voidsent queen.
